sentence.english: I can carry ten books on my head.

definitions: classifier for principles, items, clauses, tasks, research projects etc.

sentence.simplified: 这项计划完成得十分成功。
sentence.traditional: 這項計劃完成得十分成功。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè xiàng jìhuà wánchéng de shífēn chénggōng.
sentence.english: This plan was completed successfully.

sentence.simplified: 我的经理让我做一个很重要的项目。
sentence.traditional: 我的經理讓我做一個很重要的項目。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ de jīnglǐ ràng wǒ zuò yí gè hěn zhòngyào de xiàngmù.
sentence.english: My manager asked me to do a very important project.

sentence.simplified: 这名单上的名字是按字母顺序排列的。
sentence.traditional: 這名單上的名字是按字母順序排列的。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè míngdān shàng de míngzi shì àn zìmǔ shùnxù páiliè de.
sentence.english: The names on this list are in alphabetical order.

sentence.simplified: 预订好晚餐后我们去看电影。
sentence.traditional: 預訂好晚餐後我們去看電影。
sentence.pinyin: Yùdìng hǎo wǎncān hòu wǒmen qù kàn diànyǐng.
sentence.english: After booking dinner, we'll go watch a movie.

sentence.simplified: 学生们在课堂上学习不同类型的作文。
sentence.traditional: 學生們在課堂上學習不同類型的作文。
sentence.pinyin: Xuéshēngmen zài kètáng shàng xuéxí bùtóng lèixíng de zuòwén.
sentence.english: Students learn different types of compositions in class.

sentence.simplified: 经过几个月的训练，他的进步非常显著。
sentence.traditional: 經過幾個月的訓練，他的進步非常顯著。
sentence.pinyin: Jīngguò jǐ gè yuè de xùnliàn, tā de jìnbù fēicháng xiǎnzhù.
sentence.english: After several months of training, his progress has been very significant.

sentence.simplified: 这个国家有着悠久的历史和丰富的风俗文化。
sentence.traditional: 這個國家有著悠久的歷史和豐富的風俗文化。
sentence.pinyin: Zhège guójiā yǒuzhe yōujiǔ de lìshǐ hé fēngsú wénhuà.
sentence.english: This country has a long history and rich cultural customs.

sentence.simplified: 这里的风景如诗如画。
sentence.traditional: 這裡的風景如詩如畫。
sentence.pinyin: Zhèlǐ de fēngjǐng rú shī rú huà.
sentence.english: The scenery here is like a beautiful poem.

sentence.simplified: 每个设计师都拥有不同的设计风格。
sentence.traditional: 每個設計師都擁有不同的設計風格。
sentence.pinyin: Měi gè shèjìshī dōu yōngyǒu bùtóng de shèjì fēnggé.
sentence.english: Every designer has a different design style.

sentence.simplified: 我养成了每天早上都喝咖啡的习惯。
sentence.traditional: 我養成了每天早上都喝咖啡的習慣。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ yǎngchéng le měitiān zǎoshang dōu hē kāfēi de xíguàn.
sentence.english: I developed the habit of drinking coffee every morning.

sentence.simplified: 这首歌很动听。
sentence.traditional: 這首歌很動聽。
sentence.pinyin: zhè shǒu gē hěn dòngtīng.
sentence.english: This song is very pleasant to listen to.

sentence.simplified: 猫喜欢抓老鼠，不喜欢啃骨头。
sentence.traditional: 貓喜歡抓老鼠，不喜歡啃骨頭。
sentence.pinyin: Māo xǐhuān zhuā lǎoshǔ, bù xǐhuān kěn gǔtou.
sentence.english: Cats like to catch mice, but they don't like to chew bones.

definitions: abbr. for 體格檢查|体格检查[ti3 ge2 jian3 cha2]

sentence.simplified: 这部小说表达了一种高尚的人生观。
sentence.traditional: 這部小說表達了一種高尚的人生觀。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè bù xiǎoshuō biǎodále yī zhǒng gāoshàng de rénshēng guān.
sentence.english: This novel expresses a noble outlook on life.

sentence.simplified: 故事达到高潮时，情节十分紧张。
sentence.traditional: 故事達到高潮時，情節十分緊張。
sentence.pinyin: Gùshì dádào gāocháo shí, qíngjié shífēn jǐnzhāng.
sentence.english: When the story reached its climax, the plot became very tense.

sentence.simplified: 坐高铁要5个小时左右，坐飞机只要两个半小时左右。
sentence.traditional: 坐高鐵要5個小時左右，坐飛機只要兩個半小時左右。
sentence.pinyin: Zuò gāotiě yào wǔ gè xiǎoshí zuǒyòu, zuò fēijī zhǐyào liǎng gè bàn xiǎoshí zuǒyòu.
sentence.english: Riding the light rail takes about 5 hours, taking a plane only takes about 2 and a half hours.

sentence.simplified: 两位候选人的观点形成了鲜明的对比。
sentence.traditional: 兩位候選人的觀點形成了鮮明的對比。
sentence.pinyin: Liǎng wèi hòuxuǎnrén de guāndiǎn xíngchéng le xiānmíng de duìbǐ.
sentence.english: The views of the two candidates form a sharp contrast.

sentence.simplified: 这家餐厅的菜都很咸。
sentence.traditional: 這家餐廳的菜都很咸。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng de cài dōu hěn xián.
sentence.english: This restaurant's dishes are all very salty.

sentence.simplified: 家里没有盐了，我们要去超市买。
sentence.traditional: 家裡沒有鹽了，我們要去超市買。
sentence.pinyin: Jiālǐ méiyǒu yán le, wǒmen yào qù chāoshì mǎi.
sentence.english: There is no salt at home, we have to go to the supermarket to buy some.

sentence.simplified: 超市里的蔬菜有，红萝卜、黄瓜、茄子、生菜、洋葱、香菜和灯笼椒。
sentence.traditional: 超市裡的蔬菜有，紅蘿蔔、黃瓜、茄子、生菜、洋蔥、香菜和燈籠椒。
sentence.pinyin: Chāoshì lǐ de shūcài yǒu, hóngluóbo, huángguā, qiézi, shēngcài, yángcōng, xiāngcài hé dēnglóngjiāo.
sentence.english: The vegetables in the supermarket include carrots, cucumbers, eggplants, lettuce, onions, cilantro, and bell peppers.

sentence.simplified: 这块黄金的纯度很高。
sentence.traditional: 這塊黃金的純度很高。
sentence.pinyin: zhè kuài huángjīn de chúndù hěn gāo.
sentence.english: This piece of gold has a high purity.

sentence.simplified: 她默默地站在一旁，观察着每个人的反应。
sentence.traditional: 她默默地站在一旁，觀察著每個人的反應。
sentence.pinyin: Tā mòmò de zhàn zài yīpáng, guānchá zhe měi ge rén de fǎnyìng.
sentence.english: She stood silently on the side, observing everyone's reactions.

definitions: (to call or praise or criticize sb) by name
